/bin/zsh -lc "cat > .artifacts/webapp-qa/prompt-28-workspace.spec.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"url\": \"http://frontend:8566\",
  \"outputPath\": \"/workspace/.artifacts/webapp-qa/prompt-28-workspace.png\",
  \"viewport\": { \"width\": 1440, \"height\": 960 },
  \"steps\": [
    { \"action\": \"waitForSelector\", \"selector\": \"[data-testid='sessions-home-route']\" },
    { \"action\": \"click\", \"selector\": \"button.button--primary\" },
    { \"action\": \"assertUrlIncludes\", \"value\": \"/sessions/\" },

    { \"action\": \"assertText\", \"text\": \"Live feed not wired yet\" },
    { \"action\": \"assertText\", \"text\": \"Chat lane\" },
    { \"action\": \"waitForTimeout\", \"timeout\": 1400 },
    { \"action\": \"screenshot\", \"fullPage\": false }
  ]
}
EOF

docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml up -d backend >/dev/null && \\
sleep 3 && \\
docker exec storyteller-browser-1 sh -lc 'cd /workspace/tools/webapp-qa && npm run check -- --spec /workspace/.artifacts/webapp-qa/prompt-28-workspace.spec.json'"
